name: Typecast

forms.name: Fire
forms.pokedexDescription: This Pokémon takes on a unique form depending on its type, becoming the perfect embodiment of its element of choice, doubling both its weaknesses and its strengths. Its body is malleable and adaptable, allowing it to take any shape it needs to perform any attack of its respective type. The form is born as can never be changed.
